'''lawaga''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:cnemis|cnemis]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-w-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cnemis|cnemis]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| lawaga
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:læwægæth|læwægæth]] || [[word:læwægæj|læwægæj]] || [[word:læwægæsh|læwægæsh]] || [[word:læwægæ|læwægæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:lawawagath|lawawagath]] || [[word:lawawagaj|lawawagaj]] || [[word:lawawagash|lawawagash]] || [[word:lawawaga|lawawaga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:lawagath|lawagath]] || [[word:lawagaj|lawagaj]] || [[word:lawagash|lawagash]] || [[word:lawaga|lawaga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:lawafgath|lawafgath]] || [[word:lawafgaj|lawafgaj]] || [[word:lawafgash|lawafgash]] || [[word:lawafgaf|lawafgaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:lawagatha|lawagatha]] || [[word:lawagaja|lawagaja]] || [[word:lawagasha|lawagasha]] || [[word:lawagaka|lawagaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:lawagath|lawagath]] || [[word:lawagaj|lawagaj]] || [[word:lawagash|lawagash]] || [[word:lawaga|lawaga]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:lawagathal|lawagathal]] || [[word:lawagajal|lawagajal]] || [[word:lawagashal|lawagashal]] || [[word:lawagakal|lawagakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:lawagathatha|lawagathatha]] || [[word:lawagajaja|lawagajaja]] || [[word:lawagashasha|lawagashasha]] || [[word:lawagaka|lawagaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:lawagathan|lawagathan]] || [[word:lawagajan|lawagajan]] || [[word:lawagashan|lawagashan]] || [[word:lawagakan|lawagakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:lawagathaoro|lawagathaoro]] || [[word:lawagajaoro|lawagajaoro]] || [[word:lawagashaoro|lawagashaoro]] || [[word:lawagakaoro|lawagakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|7296ca6}}
